catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q1.explanation:
Câu:
“worked as a ___ in various places in the USA”

Đoạn:
“she became an art teacher and taught in elementary schools...”

→ Đáp án: teacher.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q2.explanation:
charcoal

Câu:
“Created drawings using ___”

Đoạn:
“creating abstract compositions in charcoal”

→ Đáp án: charcoal.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q3.explanation:
Câu:
“paintings of the city’s ___”

Đoạn:
“architectural pictures that dramatically depict the soaring skyscrapers of New York”

→ Đáp án: skyscrapers.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q4.explanation:
Câu:
“close-up paintings of ___”

Đoạn:
“In her magnified images depicting flowers”

→ magnified images = close-up paintings

→ Đáp án: flowers.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q5.explanation:
Câu:
“initially inspired to paint the many ___”

Đoạn:
“it was the numerous sun-bleached bones ... that sparked her imagination.”

→ Đáp án: bones.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q6.explanation:
Câu:
“formed the dramatic ___ of New Mexico”

Đoạn:
“the region’s spectacular landscape”

→ dramatic trong summary paraphrase từ spectacular.

→ Đáp án: landscape.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q7.explanation:
Câu:
“painted pictures of clouds and ___ seen from above”

Đoạn:
“aerial views of rivers and expansive paintings of the sky”

→ seen from above = aerial views.

→ Đáp án: rivers.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q8.explanation:
Statement:
“O’Keeffe’s style was greatly influenced by changing fashions in art”

Đoạn đầu:
“she remained independent from shifting art trends”

→ independent from = không bị ảnh hưởng bởi.

→ FALSE.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q9.explanation:
TRUE

Statement:
“When O’Keeffe finished high school, she had already made her mind up...”

Đoạn:
“By the time she graduated from high school in 1905, she had determined to make her way as an artist.”

→ had determined = had made her mind up.

→ TRUE.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q10.explanation:
Statement:
“Stieglitz first discovered O’Keeffe’s work when she sent drawings to his gallery”

Đoạn:
“She sent some of these drawings to a friend in New York, who showed them to ... Stieglitz”

→ không gửi trực tiếp cho gallery.

→ FALSE.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q11.explanation:
Statement:
“O’Keeffe was the subject of Stieglitz’s photographic work for many years.”

Đoạn:
“portraits of O’Keeffe, taken over the course of twenty years”

→ many years = twenty years.

→ TRUE.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q12.explanation:
Statement:
“paintings of the patio ... were among the artist’s favourite works.”

Bài chỉ nói:

patio was inspirational
bà vẽ hơn 30 bức tranh về nó

Không nói:

đó là favourite works.

→ NOT GIVEN.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-1-q13.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
greater quantity of work
1950s to 1970s
than at any other time
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn bắt đầu bằng:

"From the 1950s into the 1970s, O'Keeffe travelled widely, making trips to Asia, the Middle East, and Europe."

Tiếp theo:

"Flying in planes inspired her last two major series – aerial views of rivers and expansive paintings of the sky viewed from just above clouds."

"In both series, O'Keeffe increased the size of her canvases..."

Bước 3: Phân tích

Câu hỏi nói:

O'Keeffe sáng tác nhiều tác phẩm hơn bất kỳ giai đoạn nào khác.

Nhưng bài chỉ nói:

bà đi du lịch nhiều
bà thực hiện hai series tranh lớn
kích thước tranh lớn hơn

Bài không hề so sánh số lượng tác phẩm của giai đoạn 1950–1970 với các giai đoạn khác trong cuộc đời.

Không có thông tin:

vẽ nhiều nhất
vẽ ít nhất
năng suất cao nhất

=> Không đủ dữ kiện để kết luận.

Đáp án: NOT GIVEN.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q14.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“how a type of plant functions as a natural protection for coastlines”

Keyword:

type of plant
natural protection

Đoạn C:
“mangroves: ecosystems of trees and shrubs that help defend coastal areas by trapping sediment...”

→ nói về cách mangroves bảo vệ coastline.

→ Đáp án: C.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q15.explanation:
A

Câu hỏi:
“a prediction about how long it could take to stop noticing the effects of climate change”

Đoạn A:
“global warming would continue for around 40 years.”

→ prediction về thời gian effects vẫn tiếp tục.

→ Đáp án: A

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q16.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“a reference to the fact that a solution is particularly cost-effective”

Đoạn D:
“It’s much cheaper than permanently elevating houses”

→ directly nói cost-effective.

→ Đáp án: D.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q17.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“a mention of a technology used to locate areas most in need of intervention”

Đoạn F:
“Using a Geographic Information System data mapping tool...”

→ công nghệ GIS dùng để identify areas needing action.

→ Đáp án: F.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q18.explanation:
Câu:
“installation of efficient ___”

Đoạn B:
“the city has set up new pumps that can remove up to 75,000 litres of water per minute.”

→ Đáp án: pumps.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q19.explanation:
Câu:
“The construction of ___ was the first stage...”

Đoạn C:
“building semi-permeable dams”

→ Đáp án: dams

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q20.explanation:
Câu:
“building houses that can ___”

Đoạn D:
“these ones had been built to float.”

→ Đáp án: float.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q21.explanation:
Câu:
“introduce various ___ suitable for areas of high salt content.”

Đoạn E:
“cultivating naturally salt-tolerant crops”

→ Đáp án: crops.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q22.explanation:
Câu:
“A project in LA has increased the number of ___”

Đoạn F:
“include the planting of trees”

→ Đáp án: trees.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q23.explanation:
Statement:
“It is essential to adopt strategies which involve and help residents”

Đoạn:
“engage and benefit communities and local decision-makers.”

→ chính là Susanna Tol.

→ B.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q24.explanation:
Statement:
“Interventions which reduce heat are absolutely vital for our survival”

Đoạn:
“Urban cooling is literally a matter of life and death”

→ Greg Spotts.

→ E.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q25.explanation:
Statement:
“More work will need to be done in future decades”

Đoạn:
“in 20, 30, 40 years, we’ll need to go back in there and adjust”

→ Yanira Pineda.

→ A.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-2-q26.explanation:
Statement:
“The number of locations requiring action ... has grown”

Đoạn:
“this technology is becoming necessary in places that didn’t previously need it.”

→ ngày càng nhiều nơi cần adaptation.

→ C.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q27.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“an example of how one predator has been protected by the introduction of livestock guard dogs”

Đoạn D:
nói về cheetahs ở Namibia được bảo vệ hơn khi farmers dùng guard dogs và ít giết predators hơn.

→ Đáp án: D.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q28.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“an optimistic suggestion about possible positive developments”

Đoạn cuối:
“there may be a bright future for guard dogs”

→ very optimistic conclusion.

→ Đáp án: G.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q29.explanation:
B

Câu hỏi:
“a description of how the methods used by livestock guard dogs help keep predators away”

Đoạn B:
“The dogs will place themselves between the livestock and any threat, barking loudly...”

→ mô tả cách dogs hoạt động.

→ Đáp án: B.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q30.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“claims by different academics that ... dogs are successful”

Đoạn C:

Silvia Ribeiro
Linda van Bommel
Chris Johnson

đều đưa evidence rằng guard dogs hiệu quả.

→ Đáp án: C.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q31.explanation:
Câu hỏi:
“a reference to how livestock guard dogs gain their skills”

Đoạn B:
“These dogs are raised from an early age with the animals...”

và:
“Their initial training...”

→ nói về training.

→ Đáp án: B.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q32.explanation:
Statement:
“The use of guard dogs may save the lives of both livestock and wild animals.”

Julie Young:
“If ranchers don’t have a dead cow ... [they won’t] kill a wolf.”

→ cứu livestock và predators.

→ D.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q33.explanation:
Statement:
“Claims ... may not be totally accurate.”

Đoạn:
“self-reported results must be taken with a pinch of salt.”

→ nghĩa là chưa chắc hoàn toàn reliable.

→ E.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q34.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
negative results
not sufficiently widespread
Bước 2: Tìm người nói

Đoạn E:

"In some regions, we work with almost every farmer, but in others only one or two have dogs," says Ribeiro.

"If we are not working with everybody, we are transferring the wolf pressure to the neighbour's herd and he can use poison and kill an entire pack of wolves."

Bước 3: Phân tích

Câu hỏi:

There may be negative results if the use of livestock guard dogs is not sufficiently widespread.

Paraphrase:

not sufficiently widespread
= not working with everybody
= không áp dụng rộng rãi cho tất cả nông dân
negative results
= neighbour uses poison and kills wolves
= hậu quả tiêu cực

Người phát biểu là Ribeiro.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q35.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
best way
protecting farm animals
appropriately handled
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn C:

"If they are managed and used properly, livestock guard dogs are the most efficient control method that we have in terms of the amount of livestock that they save from predation," says van Bommel.

Bước 3: Phân tích
"the most efficient control method" = phương pháp hiệu quả nhất
"managed and used properly" = được quản lý và sử dụng đúng cách
Người phát biểu là Linda van Bommel.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q36.explanation:
Bước 1: Keyword
teaching
livestock guard dog
different focus
house guard dog
Bước 2: Tìm đoạn văn

Đoạn B:

"Their initial training is to make them understand that livestock is going to be their life," says Dan Macon.

"A fluffy white puppy is fun to be around, but too much human affection makes it a great dog for guarding the front porch, rather than a great livestock guard dog."

Bước 3: Phân tích

Câu hỏi nói:

Chó bảo vệ gia súc cần được huấn luyện theo cách khác chó giữ nhà.

Đoạn văn nói:

Chó bảo vệ gia súc phải gắn bó với đàn vật nuôi.
Không nên nhận quá nhiều sự quan tâm của con người.
Nếu được nuôi như thú cưng, nó sẽ trở thành chó giữ nhà tốt hơn là chó bảo vệ gia súc.
=>  A (Dan Macon)

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q37.explanation:
Câu:
“rise in the deaths of other predators, particularly ___”

Đoạn F:
“the number of jackals killed ... increased.”

→ Đáp án: jackals.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q38.explanation:
Câu:
“dogs could have ___ which may affect other species”

Đoạn:
“They have been found to spread diseases to wild animals”

→ Đáp án: diseases.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q39.explanation:
Câu:
“reduce the amount of ___ available”

Đoạn:
“They may also compete with other carnivores for food.”

→ Đáp án: food.

catalog-cam-20-4-reading-part-3-q40.explanation:
Câu:
“nests ... threatened by predators such as ___”

Đoạn:
“foxes would normally raid them.”

→ Đáp án: foxes.
